mapper.select: /*selectMessengerRoomsList*/ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT r.ROOM_ID, r.ROOM_TYPE, r.TITLE, m.USER_ID AS userId, r.ACTIVE_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY r.ROOM_ID DESC) AS RNUM, ( SELECT cm.CONTENT FROM CHAT_MESSAGE cm WHERE cm.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID AND cm.DELETED_YN = 'N' ORDER BY cm.MESSAGE_ID DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY ) AS LAST_MESSAGE, ( SELECT cm.CREATED_AT FROM CHAT_MESSAGE cm WHERE cm.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID AND cm.DELETED_YN = 'N' ORDER BY cm.MESSAGE_ID DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY ) AS LAST_MESSAGE_AT FROM CHAT_ROOM r JOIN CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER m ON r.ROOM_ID = m.ROOM_ID WHERE m.USER_ID = #{loginId} AND (m.MEMBER_ROLE = 'OWNER' OR r.ACTIVE_YN = 'Y') ORDER BY r.UPDATED_AT DESC NULLS LAST, r.ROOM_ID DESC )
mapper.insert: /*insertChatRoom*/ INSERT INTO CHAT_ROOM( TITLE , CREATED_BY , CREATED_AT , ACTIVE_YN , ROOM_ID) VALUES( #{title} , #{loginId} , SYSTIMESTAMP , 'Y' , #{roomId})
/*insertChatRoomMember*/ INSERT INTO CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER( USER_ID , MEMBER_ROLE , JOINED_AT , ROOM_ID , MEMBER_NM) VALUES( #{userId} , #{memberRole} , SYSTIMESTAMP , #{roomId} , #{memberNm})
mapper.select: /*selectChatRoomMemberList*/ SELECT USER_ID , MEMBER_ROLE , JOINED_AT , LEFT_AT , LAST_READ_MESSAGE_ID , ROOM_ID , MEMBER_NM FROM CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId}
/*selectUser*/ SELECT A.USER_ID AS "userId" ,A.USER_NM AS "userNm" FROM USER_INFO A WHERE A.USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{userId} || '%' OR A.USER_NM LIKE '%' || #{userNm} || '%'
/*selectOnlineUsers*/ SELECT LGN_ID AS "userId" FROM CNTN_LOG WHERE CNTN_DT >= SYSDATE - 1/24 AND LGN_ID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY LGN_ID ORDER BY MAX(CNTN_DT) DESC
mapper.insert: /*insertMessage*/ INSERT INTO CHAT_MESSAGE( MESSAGE_ID , USER_ID , CONTENT , CREATED_AT , DELETED_YN , ROOM_ID) VALUES( #{messageId} , #{userId} , #{content} , SYSTIMESTAMP , 'N' , #{roomId})
mapper.select: /*selectLatestMessage*/ SELECT MESSAGE_ID AS "messageId", ROOM_ID AS "roomId", USER_ID AS "senderId", CONTENT AS "content", TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "createdAt" FROM CHAT_MESSAGE WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId} AND USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
/*selectMessageList*/ SELECT MESSAGE_ID , USER_ID AS "senderId" , CONTENT , CREATED_AT , EDITED_AT , DELETED_YN , ROOM_ID FROM CHAT_MESSAGE WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId}
SELECT USER_ID , MEMBER_ROLE , ROOM_ID FROM CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND ROOM_ID = #{roomId}
